results.title: BBC FIFA World Cup viewers ask 'is that him?' as pop legend spotted at semi-final

results.description: Dallas Cowboys WR George Pickens didn’t get mega long-term contract extension he hoped for after a break-out All-Pro campaign in 2025. At least not yet. He will have to settle...
